pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h2",null,{"id":"项目简介","children":"项目简介"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"本仓库为 Debian 操作系统的安全更新软件源。"}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"使用方法","children":"使用方法"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["大部分 Debian 的软件源配置文件使用传统的 One-Line-Style，路径为 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list"}],"；但是对于容器镜像，从 Debian 12 开始，其软件源配置文件变更为 DEB822 格式，路径为 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/debian.sources"}],"。一般情况下，将对应文件中 Debian 默认的源地址 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"http://security.debian.org/"}]," 替换为镜像地址即可。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"为了保证安全更新的时效性，Debian 不推荐用户使用安全更新镜像，如确需使用请选择同步频次较高的镜像站。"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"传统格式etcaptsourceslist","children":["传统格式（",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list"}],"）"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"Debian 版本","items":[["Debian 13 (trixie)",{"release":"trixie","security":"-security","nonfree":" non-free non-free-firmware"}],["Debian 12 (bookworm)",{"release":"bookworm","security":"-security","nonfree":" non-free non-free-firmware"}],["Debian 11 (bullseye)",{"release":"bullseye","security":"-security","nonfree":" non-free"}],["testing",{"release":"testing","security":"-security","nonfree":" non-free non-free-firmware"}]]},{"title":"启用源码源","note":"源码源通常用于构建和调试，开启后影响更新速度","name":"src","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":"","falseValue":"# "},{"title":"使用非自由软件源","name":"nf","defaultValue":true,"trueValue":true,"falseValue":false}],"templateId":"template-0"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"deb822-格式etcaptsourceslistddebiansources","children":["DEB822 格式（",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/debian.sources"}],"）"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"Debian 版本","items":[["Debian 13 (trixie)",{"release_deb822":"trixie"}],["Debian 12 (bookworm)",{"release_deb822":"bookworm"}],["testing",{"release_deb822":"testing"}]]},{"title":"启用源码源","note":"源码源通常用于构建和调试，开启后影响更新速度","name":"src","defaultValue":false,"trueValue":"","falseValue":"# "},{"title":"使用非自由软件源","name":"nf","defaultValue":true,"trueValue":true,"falseValue":false}],"templateId":"template-1"}]]}]
